label: About
title: About Rooted Room Section
short_blurb: A daily generated front page where the image is the interface.
body: Daily Frontpage is a daily generated interactive front page. Each edition starts from recent saved signals and source research, becomes a new image-led scene, and stays explorable in the archive. The image is the interface: visible marks, objects, and surfaces in the scene open the real sources that shaped the day.

This iteration began with 101 recent saved-signal files and 78 captured links, then narrowed the page to 9 source windows around @DraftedAI: Today, we are releasing Drafted V2. The fastest AI model and experience for... and @amazingthings_: A glimpse into the future of indoor gardening with the Izestee desktop..., plus 7 more. A source image from pbs.twimg.com helped set the palette, contrast, edge behavior, and gesture. The scene became Rooted Room Section: Rooted room section: an architectural section plate, overhead-plan camera grammar, centered on a large off-white generated home slab with hard grid edges and bright regenerated room apertures. A second hero column of transparent aeroponic roots rises at the left edge. After the image was made, a plate-reading pass mapped 9 visible regions and the mask audit tightened them against central cutaway home mass and room edges, transparent planted upper chamber, and cyan roof and wall slits.

typography.rationale: Bricolage Grotesque and Space Grotesk fit record, arcade, and listening-room editions while Fraunces keeps source captions tactile.
